titleStmt.title: SII 8.216: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 216. (A.R. No. 619 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājādhirājade vaṟku yāṇṭu 9- Āvatu kumpanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu navami yum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rocaṇi nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu meṉmalaip paḻayaṉūr
nāṭṭup paḻaiyaṉūruṭaiya vetavaṉamuṭaiyāṉ karuṇākaratevaṉārāṉa Amarakonār Uṭaiyār tiruvalañcuḻiyuṭaiyār tirumuṉperiya Iṭṭa Añcunilaip pittaḷait tiruviḷakku Oṉṟāl pittaḷai niṟai muṉṉūṟ ṟorupatteṇ pala
ṭai Irunūṟṟu muppattiru palamum Āka niṟai Aññūṟ ṟaimpatiṉ palamum tirukkuttiviḷakku Oṉṟināl pittaḷai niṟai muṉṉūṟṟuirupattiru palamum karuve Āka niṟai Aiññūṟṟu nāṟpatta
Iraṇṭil nittaṟpaṭiyāl Iraṇṭu tirunantāviḷakku Erivatākavum Ittirunantāviḷakku Iraṇṭukkum viḷakku Oṉṟukku veṇṭum tiruviḷakku ney nūṟṟeṇpattiru nāḻi ṭuvatāka I koṉār Uṭaiyār śrīpātattu nīrvāttu
ṟut toṇṇūṟṟi yil Āticaṇṭeśva ratevar yam Ārāyaccamaintu niṉṟa māṭhalagottra ttu caiva heśva rak kaṇkāṇi tiruvitinampiyum śrī
�ṉum tevarkaṉmi tiruvalañcuḻipaṭṭaṉum māṭilaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉum koyiṟkaṇakku vaṭukakkuṭaiyāṉum veṇṇaimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa tāṉattār kaikkoṇṭu kuṭutta Ikkoyil tirunantāviḷakkuiṭaiyaril koṉ tiruvaṉāṉa tirucciṟṟampalakkoṉ viḷakku mā
teṭṭum koṉ poyyātatamiḻuranāṉa tiruvitikkoṉ viḷakku Arai koṇṭa Āṭu nāṟpatteṭṭum nāṅkaḷ Iruvomuṅ kūṭak kaikkoṇṭa yoṉṟum koṉ Uṭaiyāṉ viḷakku Araikku kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu nāṟpat teṭṭum Āḻkoṇṭanāyakakkoṉ viḷakku Araik
ṟṟiraṇṭum kiṭāy Iraṇ muvāpperāṭāka kaikko tirununtāviḷakku Iraṇṭu tirunāḻi Urikkum Ikkoyil taḷi kaḷum Eṅkaḷ
kkaṉmikkaḷum Eṅkaḷ vamśa ttārum cantirātittavarai Upaiyamāka Aḷakkakkaṭa llilum cempilum Eḻuttu veṭṭikkoḷka veṉṟu Icaiñcu Ivvāṭu kaikkoṇṭom Ittiruvala yātatamiḻuraṉāṉa tiruvītikkoṉum ṭaiyāṉum villi Āṭkoṇṭa
nāyakakkoṉum Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 8.216 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
